case_title: SILVIN MORGAN et al VS. JAMINAH A. KING

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,026.00 FILED BY MORGAN, SILVIN MORGAN, ANNIE AS TO DEFENDANT KING, JAMINAH A. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-23-2011 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED (NO SERVICE FEE) SERVED JAN-24-2011, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT KING, JAMINAH A.
SUBSTITUTION OF ATTORNEY: COLLINS, MICHAEL W SUBSTITUTED FOR PRO PER AS ATTORNEY FOR MORGAN, SILVIN
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $993.00 ACCRUED INTEREST AS TO DEFENDANT KING, JAMINAH A.

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC. 683.110 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MORGAN, SILVIN MORGAN, ANNIE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KING, JAMINAH A. $1,011.00 PRINCIPAL, $993.00 INTEREST, $45.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,049.00, [$2049.00 = $1011.00(PRINCIPAL) + $993.00(INTEREST) + $45.00(RENEWAL FEE/COST) ]
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-23-2011 - JUDGMENT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. JUDGE: DONALD MITCHELL. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
APPLICATION FOR RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MORGAN, SILVIN MORGAN, ANNIE AS TO DEFENDANT KING, JAMINAH A. NOTICE OF RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT ISSUED
PROOF OF SERVICE OF NOTICE OF RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT; APPLICATION FOR AND RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MORGAN, ANNIE SERVED JAN-25-2021, MAIL AS TO DEFENDANT KING, JAMINAH A.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MORGAN, SILVIN MORGAN, ANNIE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KING, JAMINAH A. $981.00 PRINCIPAL, $30.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,011.00, DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
